siteSettings.ctaTitle: Ready to Build Your Dream Sports Facility?
siteSettings.ctaSubtitle: Get a free consultation and site visit across India.
siteSettings.aboutText: Founded in 2013, SportSurf was born from a singular vision: to bring world-class athletic infrastructure to India.
siteSettings.aboutOriginText: Today, "Antigravity" represents our next evolution — a commitment to physics-driven design that minimizes injury risk and maximizes performance potential.

testimonials.name: Dr. Arvind Kumar
testimonials.quote: SportSurf Antigravity transformed our campus. Their engineering precision is unlike anything we've seen in India.

testimonials.name: Sarah Mehra
testimonials.quote: The quality of the synthetic turf is world-class. Our students are performing at higher levels with less injury risk.
